response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, the candidate has minimal demonstrable C++ experience beyond a brief role at National Instruments over a decade ago, with no recent or substantial work in C++, STL, multi-threading, message brokers, or industrial cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443 — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems engineering background across diverse technologies
Proven experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems
Active contributor to open-source projects and technical education initiatives
concerns: Lacks recent or deep C++/STL experience required for core development responsibilities
No evidence of experience with industrial automation protocols (Modbus, OPC UA, etc.) or IEC 62443 security standards
Primary recent work is in TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang, not the on-prem/cloud C++ systems the role demands
